description: A third-party contractor needs temporary access to the port to perform work. The admin must issue a temporary pass.

nodes.task_description: Receive the access request from the contractor, including the names of their workers and the duration of the job.

expected_outcome.value: Admin receives the list of workers who need access for one week.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the contracting company has valid insurance on file.

expected_outcome.value: Admin confirms the contractor's insurance is up to date.

nodes.task_description: Issue temporary access cards for the workers, valid only for the duration of the job.

expected_outcome.value: Temporary ID cards with a one-week expiry date are created and issued.
